languages.text: Этой проржавевшей Валькирии с эмблемой 32-го меровского полка по меньшей мере несколько веков.
This rust-eaten Valkyrie with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.
languages.original_text: Этой проржавевшей Валькирии с эмблемой 32-го меровского полка по меньшей мере несколько веков.

traits.locale_text: This rusted shuttle with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.
This rusted shuttle with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.
This rusted shuttle with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.

languages.text: この錆びたシャトルは、32番目のメロヴィアン連隊のエンブレムが刻まれている。少なくとも数百年は前のものだ。
languages.original_text: This rusted shuttle with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.

traits.locale_text: この錆びたシャトルは、32番目のメロヴィアン連隊のエンブレムが刻まれている。少なくとも数百年は前のものだ。

languages.text: Merov Alayı amblemini taşıyan bu paslanmış Valkür, en az birkaç asırlık.
languages.original_text: This rust-eaten Valkyrie with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.

traits.locale_text: Merov Alayı amblemini taşıyan bu paslanmış Valkür, en az birkaç asırlık.

languages.text: Esta Valkyrie oxidada con el emblema del 32º regimiento meroviano tiene al menos varios siglos de antigüedad.
languages.original_text: This rust-eaten Valkyrie with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.

traits.locale_text: Esta Valkyrie oxidada con el emblema del 32º regimiento meroviano tiene al menos varios siglos de antigüedad.

languages.text: 这艘锈蚀殆尽的瓦尔基里上印有梅罗夫第32团的徽章，至少已服役了好几个世纪。
languages.original_text: This rust-eaten Valkyrie with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.

traits.locale_text: 这艘锈蚀殆尽的瓦尔基里上印有梅罗夫第32团的徽章，至少已服役了好几个世纪。

languages.text: Cette Valkyrie rouillée qui porte l'emblème du 32e régiment merovien date d'au moins plusieurs siècles.
languages.original_text: This rust-eaten Valkyrie with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.

traits.locale_text: Cette Valkyrie rouillée qui porte l'emblème du 32e régiment merovien date d'au moins plusieurs siècles.

languages.text: Diese rostige Walküre mit dem Emblem des 32. merovianischen Regiments ist mehrere Jahrhunderte alt.
languages.original_text: This rust-eaten Valkyrie with the emblem of the 32nd Merovian Regiment is at least several centuries old.

traits.locale_text: Diese rostige Walküre mit dem Emblem des 32. merovianischen Regiments ist mehrere Jahrhunderte alt.
